title: StaffForge Agent
description: Canonical agent definition for the StaffForge multi-provider AI agent framework — C.R.E.A.D.O. compliant

id.description: Unique agent identifier (kebab-case, must match filename without extension)

description.description: One-line summary of the agent's role (C.R.E.A.D.O. Contexto)

version.description: Semantic version of the agent definition

mode.description: Agent mode — primary (Tab cycle), subagent (@mention), or all (both)

keywords.description: Search keywords for routing and discovery

capabilities.description: Capabilities this agent provides to pipelines

tags.description: Arbitrary tags for filtering and grouping

depends_on.description: Agent IDs that must complete before this agent runs

before.description: Agent IDs that must run after this agent (this agent gates them)

after.description: Agent IDs that must complete before this agent runs (alias for depends_on)

compatible_platforms.description: Platforms this agent is compatible with

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining expected input structure (C.R.E.A.D.O. Datos de entrada — validates incoming data from other agents or user)

output_schema.description: JSON Schema defining expected output structure (C.R.E.A.D.O. Output — validates agent response before passing downstream)

max_iterations.description: Maximum consecutive interactions before abort (Runtime Guardrail)

input_sanitize.description: Enable prompt injection sanitization on inputs (Input Guardrail)

output_dlp.description: Enable secret/PII leak scanning on output (Output Guardrail)

hallucination_check.description: Enable cross-reference fact-checking against source context (Output Guardrail)

owner.description: Owner or team responsible for this agent

extends.description: Parent agent ID to inherit body content from
